zh.lifeSummary: Cecilia de Trollope是Sir William Trollope的女兒，於1122年出生在英國林可爾史爾多丁頓。她和William Bradshaigh de Sayer至少有1個兒子。她去世於1161年在法國皮卡迪索姆享年39歲。

nameMeanings.name: Trollope
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Troughburn in Hethpool (Northumberland), which was formerly known as Trollop. The old placename appears to derive from Old Norse troll ‘troll, supernatural being’ + Old English hop ‘small enclosed valley’.

History: An English family of this name trace their descent from John Trowlope, who lived at Thornlaw (Durham) in the late 14th century. One of his descendants was the novelist Anthony Trollope (1815–82).

variants.name: Tulip
meanings: English (Northumberland and Durham): probably a late variant of   Trollope  .

nameMeanings.name: Cecilia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin name Caecilia, feminine form of Caecilius ( see Cecil ). This was a good deal more common than the masculine form, largely due to the fame of the 2nd- or 3rd-century virgin martyr whose name is still mentioned daily in the Roman Catholic Canon of the Mass. She is regarded as the patron saint of music and has inspired works such as Purcell's ‘Ode on St Cecilia's Day’, although the reasons for this association are not clear.

variants.name: Cecelia
meanings: From the Latin name Caecilia, feminine form of Caecilius ( see Cecil ). This was a good deal more common than the masculine form, largely due to the fame of the 2nd- or 3rd-century virgin martyr whose name is still mentioned daily in the Roman Catholic Canon of the Mass. She is regarded as the patron saint of music and has inspired works such as Purcell's ‘Ode on St Cecilia's Day’, although the reasons for this association are not clear.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Cecilia de Trollope was born in 1122, in Doddington, Lincolnshire, England as the daughter of Sir William Trollope. She had at least 1 son with William Bradshaigh de Sayer. She died in 1161, in Somme, Picardie, France, at the age of 39.

ja.lifeSummary: Cecilia de Trollopeは1122年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアドッドイントンでSir William Trollopeの娘として生まれた。彼女はWilliam Bradshaigh de Sayerとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1161年にフランスピカーディソンメで39歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Cecilia de Trollope(은)는 1122년 영국 링코실르 도딩턴에서 Sir William Trollope의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 William Bradshaigh de Sayer(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1161년 프랑스 피카디 솜에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.
